companies.name: Sonata Software
recent_news: Sonata Software reported stable revenue growth in Q1 FY24 with strong demand in digital transformation services.
Company expanded its AI-driven enterprise solutions footprint in North America and Europe in early 2024.
tech_signals: Strong momentum in cloud migration and AI-integrated SaaS products
Consistent gross margin improvement over last 4 quarters
key_quotes: Sonata continues to be a preferred partner for global enterprises seeking scalable software solutions.
Revenue growth driven by repeat clients in banking and healthcare verticals.
companies.description: Sonata Software is an independent software vendor offering digital transformation, enterprise applications, and cloud solutions to global clients, with a focus on BFSI, healthcare, and manufacturing sectors.
